templates.title: Epic Game Trailer
templates.description: Cinematic combat sequences with dynamic hero reveals and explosive action

prompt.main: Epic game trailer opening with warrior's battle-scarred helmet filling the frame. Lightning strikes illuminate medieval battlefield as camera pulls back revealing massive armies clashing. Hero character bursts through enemy lines with slow-motion sword strikes, particle effects trailing each swing. Dragon swoops overhead breathing fire across the battlefield. Dynamic camera tracks alongside cavalry charge through explosions. Magical spells create colorful light bursts. Close-up of hero's determined eyes before final strike. Game logo materializes from embers with orchestral crescendo. HUD elements fade in showing release date.

elements.cameraMovement: Dramatic pull-backs, sweeping crane shots, slow-motion hero moments, dynamic battle tracking
elements.subject: Armored warriors, dragons, magical effects, epic battles, game logo
elements.scene: Medieval battlefield, burning castles, mystical landscapes, storm-filled skies
elements.motion: Sword combat, spell casting, dragon flight, cavalry charges, explosions
elements.lighting: Lightning flashes, fire glow, magical auras, dramatic rim lighting
elements.atmosphere: Epic, heroic, intense, cinematic blockbuster quality
elements.style: AAA game trailer cinematography - cinematic combat sequences

modifiedElements.scene: Space station battle with laser weapons and shields
modifiedElements.subject: Space marines, alien enemies, energy weapons

modifiedElements.motion: Silent takedowns, parkour movement, gadget usage
modifiedElements.lighting: Shadows and darkness with tactical vision

bestPractices: Build tension with pacing and music synchronization
Mix wide battle shots with intimate character moments
Show unique gameplay mechanics in cinematic context
End with impactful logo reveal and call-to-action

examples.sampleOutput: God of War Ragnarok, Elden Ring, Assassin's Creed trailers

templates.title: Open World Exploration
templates.description: Vast landscapes with dynamic weather systems and immersive environments

prompt.main: Sunrise breaks over vast open world landscape. Camera glides over rolling hills revealing diverse biomes - lush forests transition to snowy mountains. Character on horseback gallops across meadow as dynamic weather shifts from sunshine to approaching storm. Time-lapse shows day-night cycle with stars appearing. Wildlife roams naturally - deer drinking from streams, eagles soaring overhead. Ancient ruins peek through foliage. Camera dives underwater showing vibrant coral reefs. Volumetric fog rolls through valleys. Map UI appears showing vast unexplored regions. Environmental sounds create immersive atmosphere.

elements.cameraMovement: Sweeping aerial shots, smooth gliding, environmental reveals, seamless biome transitions
elements.subject: Vast landscapes, weather systems, wildlife, environmental details
elements.scene: Open world with forests, mountains, oceans, deserts, ancient ruins
elements.motion: Weather changes, wildlife movement, water flow, foliage swaying
elements.lighting: Dynamic day-night cycle, weather-based lighting, volumetric effects

modifiedElements.scene: Ruined cities reclaimed by nature, radiation zones
Bioluminescent forests, floating islands, dual suns

bestPractices: Demonstrate dynamic weather and time systems
Include ambient wildlife for living world feel

examples.sampleOutput: Horizon Forbidden West, Red Dead Redemption 2, Zelda BOTW

templates.title: Esports Tournament Hype
templates.description: Player reactions and crowd energy in competitive gaming environments

prompt.main: Stadium lights sweep across roaring crowd of thousands. Quick cuts between player booths showing intense focus - fingers dancing on keyboards, precise mouse movements. Split-screen clutch play with player webcam showing emotional reaction. Crowd erupts as underdog team secures victory. Slow-motion fist bumps between teammates. Confetti cannons explode with team colors. Trophy lifted overhead with stage pyrotechnics. Player stats and tournament bracket graphics overlay. Commentator booth excitement. Champions interviewed on stage. Drone shot pulls back showing packed arena. Social media reactions flood screen.

elements.cameraMovement: Quick cuts, booth cams, crowd sweeps, stage coverage, drone aerials
elements.subject: Pro players, crowd reactions, trophy ceremony, stage production
elements.scene: Esports arena, player booths, main stage, audience sections
elements.motion: Player reactions, crowd waves, confetti, pyrotechnics, celebrations
elements.lighting: Stage lights, LED displays, spotlights, team color themes

modifiedElements.scene: Player webcam grid, home setups, virtual stage

bestPractices: Capture raw player emotions and reactions
Show crowd energy and scale of event
Include key gameplay moments with context

examples.sampleOutput: League Worlds Finals, CS:GO Majors, EVO Championships

templates.title: Character Creation Showcase
templates.description: Customization options and ability demonstrations with detailed UI

prompt.main: Character creation screen fades in with base model rotating on pedestal. UI sliders adjust facial features in real-time - eyes widening, jaw reshaping. Hair styles cycle through with physics simulation. Armor pieces materialize onto character with particle effects. Color customization shows RGB spectrum sweeping across gear. Class selection triggers transformation - warrior muscles bulge, mage gains mystical aura. Skill tree appears with branching paths lighting up. Combat preview shows abilities in action arena. Emote wheel demonstrates personality options. Final character pose with stats display. Name entry with unique font styles.

elements.cameraMovement: Orbital character view, UI element focus, smooth transitions
elements.subject: Character model, customization UI, armor sets, ability effects
elements.scene: Creation chamber, preview arena, skill visualization space
elements.motion: Model rotation, feature morphing, ability demonstrations, UI animations
elements.lighting: Pedestal spotlights, ability glows, UI illumination

modifiedElements.subject: Cybernetic implants, alien races, tech armor

bestPractices: Include diverse body types and styles

examples.sampleOutput: Baldur's Gate 3, Cyberpunk 2077, Elden Ring creators

templates.title: Virtual Concert Experience
templates.description: In-game performances with spectacular visual effects and crowd interaction

prompt.main: Virtual concert venue materializes with thousands of player avatars gathering. Stage erupts with holographic performer appearing in burst of particles. Synchronized light show pulses to beat - lasers sweep across crowd. Avatar hands raise creating sea of glowsticks. Stage transforms with each song - floating platforms, gravity-defying set pieces. Crowd emotes trigger collaborative light effects. Fireworks explode overhead forming song lyrics. Interactive moments let players affect visuals. Giant AR elements appear above venue. Camera flies through dancing crowd showing avatar diversity. Festival atmosphere with virtual merchandise booths. Grand finale with entire world transforming to music.

elements.cameraMovement: Aerial venue shots, stage fly-throughs, crowd navigation, 360 spins
elements.subject: Virtual performer, avatar crowds, stage effects, environmental transforms
elements.scene: Virtual concert venue, fantastical stages, metaverse locations
elements.motion: Dancing avatars, particle effects, stage transformations, crowd waves
elements.lighting: Concert lighting, lasers, pyrotechnics, synchronized colors

modifiedElements.lighting: Intense strobes, LED walls, bass visualizations
modifiedElements.motion: DJ mixing, crowd jumping, drop moments

bestPractices: Sync all visual effects to music timing
Show massive scale through crowd shots

examples.sampleOutput: Travis Scott Fortnite, Ariana Grande Fortnite, Roblox concerts

templates.title: Speedrun Highlights
templates.description: Timer overlays and route optimization with frame-perfect execution

prompt.main: Speedrun timer starts at 00:00.00 with runner performing frame-perfect wall jump. Split comparison shows pace ahead of world record. Glitch execution launches character across map with trajectory overlay. Timer turns gold indicating best segment. Route visualization shows optimal path through level. Frame data appears during trick execution. Multiple attempts montage shows consistency grinding. Clutch save from run-ending mistake with heart rate monitor spike. Final boss skip with precise positioning. Timer stops with new personal best celebration. Leaderboard update showing ranking improvement. Strategy breakdown with controller input display.

elements.cameraMovement: Game footage with overlay focus, occasional runner cam
elements.subject: Speedrunner gameplay, timer overlays, route visualizations, input displays
elements.scene: Various game levels with optimization paths highlighted
elements.motion: Precise movements, glitch execution, rapid menu navigation
elements.lighting: Game-specific with overlay highlights for important moments

examples.sampleOutput: GDQ highlights, SummoningSalt documentaries, WR progression videos

templates.title: Game Development Behind Scenes
templates.description: Motion capture sessions and asset creation with developer insights

prompt.main: Motion capture studio with actors in sensor suits performing combat choreography. Split screen shows real movements translating to game character. 3D artist sculpting character model with tablet, time-lapse of progression. Level designer placing assets in engine with real-time lighting adjustments. Code editor with gameplay systems being debugged, variable values changing. Sound designer recording foley - footsteps, weapon impacts. Voice actor in booth delivering emotional dialogue. Team standup meeting with task board and concept art. Playtesting session with developers observing and taking notes. Before/after shots of prototype versus polished content. Version control commit messages scrolling by.

elements.cameraMovement: Documentary style, over-shoulder shots, studio tours, screen captures
elements.subject: Game developers, mocap actors, development tools, work-in-progress content
elements.scene: Development studios, mocap stages, recording booths, offices
elements.motion: Creative work, mocap performances, iterative improvements
elements.lighting: Natural office lighting, mocap stage lights, monitor glows

modifiedElements.scene: Large studio spaces, hundreds of developers

examples.sampleOutput: God of War documentaries, Indie Game: The Movie, NoClip docs

templates.title: Battle Royale Action
templates.description: Map shrinking mechanics and elimination moments with tactical gameplay

prompt.main: 100 players drop from battle bus over vast island map. Parachutes deploy with players diving toward different landing zones. Fast looting montage - weapons, shields, materials gathering. Storm circle appears on map with timer countdown. First elimination with hitmarker and elimination feed. Building mechanics showcase - rapid construction during firefight. Squad coordination with ping system and voice comms indicators. Vehicle chase across shrinking map. Final circle intensity with only 3 players remaining. Tactical positioning behind cover. Victory royale screen with celebration emotes. Stats screen showing eliminations, damage dealt, placement.

elements.cameraMovement: Third-person action, tactical overviews, elimination replays, victory pans
elements.subject: Players battling, storm circles, building mechanics, final showdowns
elements.scene: Large island map with diverse locations, shrinking play area
elements.motion: Parachuting, running, building, shooting, vehicle driving
elements.lighting: Dynamic time of day, storm effects, muzzle flashes, explosions

modifiedElements.scene: Sci-fi map with advanced tech and abilities
modifiedElements.motion: Jetpack movement, energy weapons, shield deploys

bestPractices: Feature both solo and squad play

examples.sampleOutput: Fortnite, Apex Legends, PUBG gameplay trailers

templates.title: RPG Story Moments
templates.description: Dialogue choices and emotional cutscenes with branching narratives

prompt.main: Character enters ancient throne room with dust particles floating in light beams. Dialogue wheel appears with moral choices - paragon, renegade, neutral options. Close-up on NPC's facial expressions showing emotional weight of conversation. Player choice triggers branching cutscene - alliance formed or conflict initiated. Inventory screen shows quest item examination with lore description. Party members react to decisions with approval/disapproval indicators. Flashback sequence with sepia tone showing character backstory. Romance option dialogue with relationship progression. Major plot revelation with dramatic camera angles. Companion loyalty mission completion affecting story outcome. Multiple ending variations based on accumulated choices.

elements.cameraMovement: Cinematic dialogue framing, emotional close-ups, dramatic reveals
elements.subject: Player character, NPCs, dialogue systems, story consequences
elements.scene: Fantasy settings, throne rooms, taverns, battlefields, intimate moments
elements.motion: Facial animations, gesture emphasis, environmental storytelling
elements.lighting: Mood lighting, candlelight conversations, dramatic shadows

modifiedElements.scene: Space stations, alien worlds, holographic interfaces
modifiedElements.subject: Alien races, tech choices, galactic consequences

examples.sampleOutput: Mass Effect, The Witcher 3, Baldur's Gate 3 story trailers

templates.title: VR Gaming Immersion
templates.description: First-person perspective with hand tracking and haptic feedback visualization

prompt.main: VR headset view fades in showing virtual hands materializing. Natural hand movements tracked perfectly - fingers flexing, grabbing virtual objects. Physics interaction demonstration - picking up items, throwing with realistic trajectories. Haptic feedback visualization shows controller vibration on contact. Room-scale movement with guardian boundary appearing. Climbing mechanic using hand-over-hand motion. Weapon handling with manual reloading actions. Gesture-based magic system with hand movements creating spells. Social VR space with other players' full body avatars. Mixed reality view showing player in real space within virtual world. Comfort options demonstration - teleport movement, vignetting. Eye tracking for foveated rendering highlight.

elements.cameraMovement: First-person VR perspective, natural head tracking, smooth locomotion
elements.subject: Virtual hands, interactive objects, VR interfaces, other players
elements.scene: VR environments, mixed reality spaces, physics playgrounds
elements.motion: Hand tracking, object manipulation, gesture controls, body movement
elements.lighting: Volumetric lighting, interactive light sources, atmospheric effects

examples.sampleOutput: Half-Life: Alyx, Beat Saber, Asgard's Wrath 2 trailers
